response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior full-stack developer with broad language experience and some high-throughput systems exposure at Dunnhumby, but lacks the core domain expertise this role demands. There is no evidence of experimentation platform work, feature flagging, A/B testing infrastructure, growth engineering, or metrics/telemetry system design. The career progression tops out at Senior/Staff individual contributor with no demonstrated Principal-level scope, cross-team architectural ownership, or multi-team initiative leadership — all of which are central to this IC6 role.
strengths: High-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency DLang micro-services
Wide polyglot background covering JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, Java, and C# — satisfies the language breadth requirement
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, showing adaptability to the AI-first focus of the team
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, rollout automation, or bias/guardrail systems mentioned anywhere in the resume
No growth engineering or metrics/telemetry infrastructure background — the foundational technical domain of this role is entirely absent
Career scope remains at Senior/Staff level with no evidence of Principal-scale cross-team architectural leadership, multi-workstream ownership, or stakeholder alignment at the required level
